body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `AdvancedMH` package from `0.6, 0.7` to `0.6, 0.7, 0.8`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for AdvancedMH to 0.8, (keep existing compat)

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `AbstractMCMC` package from `3.3, 4` to `3.3, 4, 5`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for AbstractMCMC to 5, (keep existing compat)
